items.title_en: Rivian raises 2026 delivery outlook while Lucid misses Wall Street expectations for second quarter
items.title_zh: Rivian 上调 2026 年交付预期，而 Lucid 未达到华尔街对第二季度的预期
items.desc_en: Rivian is increasing its delivery outlook to between 65,000 and 70,000 EVs, up from 62,000 to 67,000 units.
items.desc_zh: Rivian 将电动汽车的交付量预期从 62,000 辆上调至 67,000 辆，上调至 65,000 辆至 70,000 辆。

items.title_en: Jeff Bezos' family office backed five AI startups in June
items.title_zh: 杰夫·贝索斯 (Jeff Bezos) 的家族办公室在 6 月份投资了五家人工智能初创公司
items.desc_en: Bezos Expeditions is now the most active family office investor thus far this year, per data from Fintrx.
items.desc_zh: 根据 Fintrx 的数据，贝索斯探险队目前是今年迄今为止最活跃的家族办公室投资者。

items.title_en: Tesla reports 480,126 vehicle deliveries for second quarter, topping expectation
items.title_zh: 特斯拉公布第二季度汽车交付量 480,126 辆，超出预期
items.desc_en: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.
items.desc_zh: 特斯拉正试图从汽车销量连续年度下滑的局面中恢复过来，部分原因是消费者对首席执行官埃隆·马斯克(Elon Musk)的强烈反对。

items.title_en: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%
items.title_zh: 美国 6 月份就业创造降温，就业人数仅增长 57,000 人；失业率为 4.2%
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to rise by 115,000 in June and the unemployment rate to hold steady at 4.3%.
items.desc_zh: 预计 6 月份非农就业人数将增加 11.5 万人，失业率将稳定在 4.3%。

items.title_en: The two mounting market risks this summer, according to JPMorgan
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，今年夏天两大市场风险不断上升
items.desc_en: JPMorgan thinks the stock market could run into some trouble this summer.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通认为今年夏天股市可能会遇到一些麻烦。

items.title_en: Ford Q2 sales drop 10.3% due to F-Series production issues, falling EV demand
items.title_zh: 由于 F 系列生产问题和电动汽车需求下降，福特第二季度销量下降 10.3%
items.desc_en: Ford said its EV sales fell by 40.7% during the quarter compared with a year earlier, while sales of its F-Series trucks, including the F-150, fell 11%.
items.desc_zh: 福特表示，该季度电动汽车销量同比下降 40.7%，而包括 F-150 在内的 F 系列卡车销量下降 11%。

items.title_en: Most prediction market contracts have low volume, leaving users exposed to volatility and bots
items.title_zh: 大多数预测市场合约的交易量都很低，使用户面临波动和机器人的影响
items.desc_en: Prediction market volume has grown exponentially but several markets never make it over $10,000.
items.desc_zh: 预测市场规模呈指数增长，但有几个市场从未超过 10,000 美元。

items.title_en: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
items.title_zh: 吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 周四股市最值得关注的 10 件事
items.desc_en: The June jobs report came in weak, and Palantir landed a big upgrade.
items.desc_zh: 6 月份就业报告疲弱，Palantir 大幅升级。

items.title_en: Donors were misled by Trump-backed Freedom 250, House Democrats allege - The Washington Post
items.title_zh: 众议院民主党人指控特朗普支持的 Freedom 250 误导了捐助者 - 《华盛顿邮报》

items.title_en: Microsoft commits $2.5 billion and 6,000 employees to new AI implementation unit
items.title_zh: 微软承诺为新的人工智能实施部门投入 25 亿美元和 6,000 名员工
items.desc_en: Microsoft is the latest tech company to form a business focused on helping customers understand and implement artificial intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 微软是最新一家专注于帮助客户理解和实施人工智能业务的科技公司。

items.title_en: High-end camping and a capital raise: AutoCamp is banking on summer travel to fuel growth
items.title_zh: 高端露营和融资：AutoCamp 指望夏季旅行来推动增长
items.desc_en: AutoCamp offers Airstream suites, polished cabins, fire pits, design-forward amenities and access to iconic outdoor destinations.
items.desc_zh: AutoCamp 提供气流套房、精美的小屋、火坑、设计先进的设施，并可通往标志性的户外目的地。

items.title_en: Meta’s push into cloud computing means Wall Street has to prepare for lower margins
items.title_zh: Meta进军云计算意味着华尔街必须为利润率下降做好准备
items.desc_en: Meta appears poised to enter the cloud computing market in an effort to monetize its massive AI infrastructure.
items.desc_zh: Meta 似乎准备进入云计算市场，以期通过其庞大的人工智能基础设施获利。

items.title_en: Watch: PM's former top aide on Starmer's first call with Trump
items.title_zh: 观看：总理前高级助手斯塔默与特朗普的第一次通话
items.desc_en: Trump was more 'funny' than he had been expecting, Morgan McSweeney told the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 摩根·麦克斯威尼告诉英国广播公司，特朗普比他想象的更“有趣”。

items.title_en: Nine Thai monks killed after 11-year-old driver collides with procession
items.title_zh: 11岁司机与游行队伍相撞，9名泰国僧人丧生
items.desc_en: The group of 35 monks and five lay followers were walking by the roadside when the truck ploughed into them.
items.desc_zh: 当卡车撞上他们时，这群 35 名僧侣和 5 名居士正在路边行走。

items.title_zh: 随着USMCA贸易谈判重新开启，福特首席执行官希望与丰田、通用汽车进口产品建立公平的竞争环境
items.desc_en: Ford reports it assembled more than 2 million vehicles in the U.S. last year – more than any other auto manufacturer, including 311,000 units for export.
items.desc_zh: 福特报告称，去年该公司在美国组装了超过 200 万辆汽车，比任何其他汽车制造商都多，其中包括 311,000 辆用于出口。

items.title_en: Americans are paying record prices for steak. Here's why demand isn't cracking
items.title_zh: 美国人正在为牛排支付创纪录的价格。这就是需求没有增长的原因
items.desc_en: Despite record beef prices, Americans aren't giving up steak. Consumers are treating beef as an affordable luxury and prioritizing it for special occasions.
items.desc_zh: 尽管牛肉价格创历史新高，美国人并没有放弃牛排。消费者将牛肉视为一种负担得起的奢侈品，并在特殊场合优先考虑它。

items.title_zh: 机场老板警告称，夏季欧盟边境延误“难以忍受”

items.desc_zh: 柏林机场负责人表示，在欧盟新的出入境系统下，度假者面临漫长的等待。

items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款

items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: China says pilot crashed small plane into skyscraper for 'personal reasons'
items.title_zh: 中国称飞行员出于“个人原因”将小型飞机撞向摩天大楼
items.desc_en: The 66-year-old, who died in the crash, had anxiety and referenced "ending his life" in his diary.
items.desc_zh: 这位在车祸中丧生的 66 岁老人感到焦虑，并在日记中提到“结束生命”。

items.desc_zh: 这位拥有美国和爱沙尼亚双重国籍的 19 岁男子已被引渡到美国，并面临联邦指控。

items.title_zh: 报道称，苹果计划到 2027 年推出五款新 iPhone，在可折叠手机的推广中着眼于中国制造的芯片
items.desc_en: Apple is planning five new iPhones by 2027 and is considering Chinese memory suppliers as it expands foldable production, reports say.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，苹果计划到 2027 年推出五款新 iPhone，并在扩大可折叠产品生产时考虑中国内存供应商。

items.title_zh: BBC发现，在法国被定罪的人口走私犯目前在英国寻求庇护

items.desc_zh: 狂犬病感染在加拿大很少见。自1924年以来，该国已有28人死于狂犬病。
